clusters.headline: Zuma showing South Africa 'middle finger' by meeting Gupta brother - minister
clusters.summary: Former President Zuma's trip to India reignites anger over a decade-old corruption scandal.

clusters.headline: France records 2,025 excess deaths at peak of heatwave as Europe braces for more extreme weather
clusters.summary: Forecasters are warning of further extreme temperatures on the continent in the next few days.

clusters.headline: PAP can continue to govern well if party is renewed with 'good people' willing to serve: PM Wong
clusters.summary: The party's youth wing launched the Young PAP Academy and the YP 40 Under 40 Action Fellowship, two new initiatives serving as a "launchpad" for the party's next generation of leaders.

clusters.headline: Congo-Kinshasa: UN - Ebola Outbreak in DRC Could Cost Africa $3.6 Bln, Put 300,000 Jobs At Risk
clusters.summary: [Independent (Kampala)] Geneva -- The Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) could cause economic losses for African countries of up to $3.6 billion and threaten more than 300,000 jobs on the continent, according to Damien Mama, UN Development Program (UNDP) Resident Representa

clusters.headline: 'I buried my parents one day after the other' - Ebola mourners learn how to grieve safely
clusters.summary: A cemetery at the epicentre of the outbreak is rapidly filling up, however large traditional funerals have been scrapped.

clusters.headline: Ibrahimovic offers support to Australia's Herrington after World Cup penalty heartbreak
Trump denies conflict of interest over crypto. And, Vatican excommunicates rebel group
clusters.summary: Trump and his family earned over $1 billion last year through cryptocurrency ventures and other businesses. And, the Vatican declared that the traditionalist Society of St. Pius X has entered schism.

clusters.headline: South Africa: Hungry and Displaced - Thousands Moved to New Musina Repatriation Centre
clusters.summary: [GroundUp] Conditions have improved but facilities are inadequate and food in short supply

clusters.headline: Ukrainian suspect hunted by police after Monaco bomb attack was 'disguised as a man'
clusters.summary: Officials believe the suspect may not have acted alone and spent days casing out the scene of the attack.

clusters.headline: Iranian analyst says Khamenei funeral will draw 20 million, seen as show of support
clusters.summary:
Iranian analyst says Khamenei funeral will draw 20 million, seen as show of support

clusters.headline: Australian officials ask fans to respect the privacy of Neil, a trouble-making seal
clusters.summary: The 5-year-old seal has a social media following twice the size of Tasmania's population, and his antics include bending traffic bollards and blocking roads.

clusters.headline: Nigeria: Africom Commander Announces Partial Withdrawal of U.S. Troops From Nigeria
clusters.summary: [Premium Times] "We have withdrawn much of our forces that were just there for that operation."
